info.name: SmartInventory Web API — Full
info.description: Complete API collection for the SmartInventory Web Frontend. Covers all non-mobile controllers: Auth, Assets, Locations, Categories, Reports, Notifications, User Preferences, and Health.

request.description: Health check endpoint. No auth required.
Login — sets {{token}} collection variable via test script.
Verify email with token from registration email.
List assets with pagination. Test script extracts first asset ID.
Move asset to a different room.
Delete an asset. Returns 204 No Content.
Generate QR code for asset (returns PNG).
Get reconciliation data (room vs detected location discrepancies).
Get full location hierarchy (sites → zones → buildings → floors → rooms).
Get inventory summary, grouped by category/status/location.
Get history for a specific asset.
Get activity log with optional date range.
Export summary as CSV or PDF.
Export asset history as CSV or PDF.
Export activity log as CSV or PDF.
Get maintenance forecast for next N days.
Get room audit data for a specific room.
Get rooms with zero assets (or below threshold).
Get location discrepancies (expected vs detected room).
